warnings: source.publisher is relation context, not a closed enum or identity key. Publisher has 39 accepted/canonical observations and should link to entity context when useful. Suggested relation: published_by.

payload.description: The Committee will approve the Proposed Metro-North Railroad Committee Work Plan for 2025 that will address initiatives to be reported on throughout the year.
The Agency will present its revised 2025 Financial Plan reflecting the 2025 Adopted Budget and an updated Financial Plan for 2025 reflecting out-year impact of any changes.
A review of the prior year's performance of railroad service through the end of calendar year 2024.
Annual report to the Committee on system-wide reliability and availability for elevators and escalators throughout the system.
A quarterly report providing data on key Equal Employment Opportunity (EEO) and Human Resources indicators relating to MNR's EEO and Diversity efforts.
A report to the Committee on Metro-North's ridership trends during 2024 based on monthly ticket sales data and the results of train ridership counts.

tool_args.label: Final Review of 2024 Operating Budget Results

payload.event_name: Final Review of 2024 Operating Budget Results
payload.description: A review of the prior year's budget results and their implications for current and future budget performance.
A quarterly report providing data on key EEO and Human Resources indicators relating to MNR's EEO and Diversity efforts.
The Committee will be advised of the Agency's key operating performance metrics and indicators for the first half of 2025.
Public comment will be accepted on the 2026 Budget.
The agency will provide the 2025 Mid-Year Forecast financial information for revenue and expense by month.
The agency will provide a comprehensive report on Safety/Security.
A quarterly report providing data on key EEO and Human Resources indicators relating to MNR's EEO and Diversity efforts.
Public comment will be accepted on the 2026 Budget.
The Committee Chair will present a draft Metro-North Committee Work Plan for 2026 that will address initiatives to be reported throughout the year.
The Committee will recommend action to the Board on the Final Proposed Budget for 2026.
The Committee will approve the Proposed Metro-North Railroad Committee Work Plan for 2026 that will address initiatives to be reported on throughout the year.
A quarterly report providing data on key EEO and Human Resources indicators relating to MNR's EEO and Diversity efforts.
Annual review and approval of the MNR Committee Charter.

payload.claim_text: The Key Performance Metrics book provides the MTA Board and members of the public with a comprehensive overview of monthly LIRR and Metro-North performance indicators including ridership, financial results, train performance, capital project progress, community events, and safety and security.
payload.subject: Key Performance Metrics book

payload.claim_text: A monthly report will be provided highlighting major accomplishments and progress on key initiatives and performance indicators.
payload.subject: President's Report

payload.claim_text: A monthly report will be provided highlighting key safety performance statistics and indicators.
payload.subject: Safety Report

payload.claim_text: MTA Police will highlight the significant police activities incurred during the month reported.
payload.subject: MTA Police

payload.claim_text: A monthly report will be provided that compares the Railroad's actual financial performance against its budget and/or forecast.
payload.subject: Financial Report

payload.description: MTA Board committee responsible for Metro-North Railroad oversight
The 2025 Metro-North Railroad Committee Work Plan is published by the Metropolitan Transportation Authority.

tool_args.label: Work plan is for Metro-North Committee

payload.description: The Metro-North Railroad Committee will approve the 2025 Work Plan in January 2025.
Annual review and approval of the MNR Committee Charter in December 2025.
The Key Performance Metrics book provides the MTA Board and members of the public with a comprehensive overview of monthly LIRR and Metro-North performance indicators.

tool_args.label: MTA Police reports to MNR Committee

payload.description: MTA Police provides a recurring report to the Metro-North Railroad Committee.
